title: Arai Ex-40X Silver Metallic

specs.material: Thermo-Molded Polycarbonate Shell with Arai's proprietary Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) liner

technical_analysis: The Arai Ex-40X represents a significant evolution in the brand's entry-level full-face lineup, utilizing an advanced thermo-moldable polycarbonate shell that offers superior impact absorption compared to traditional ABS composites. The integration of a multi-density EPS liner ensures optimal energy dissipation during low-to-medium speed impacts, while maintaining a lightweight profile essential for urban commuting and sport riding. The internal retention system features a dual-density foam structure designed to reduce pressure points on the temples and occipital bone, enhancing long-term comfort without compromising structural rigidity.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of safety and style with the Arai Ex-40X in striking Silver Metallic. Designed for the modern rider who demands uncompromising protection without sacrificing aesthetics, this helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while turning heads on every ride. The sophisticated silver finish is complemented by high-quality graphics that exude confidence and precision engineering.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Ex-40X Silver Metallic full-face helmet. Featuring advanced MIPS technology, lightweight polycarbonate construction, and superior ventilation, it offers top-tier safety for daily commuters and sport riders alike.
